_comment: Hand-curated ground-truth manifest for ClothingExtractionService. Each entry maps a source photo (in this directory) to its alpha mask (in ground_truth/) and the IoU floor we expect extraction to hit. Thresholds were calibrated by running the current pipeline against the traces once and recording the score minus a 5% safety margin. Future commits must not drop below these numbers. See capture-brief.md for how to add new fixtures.
